$comment: Canonical, machine-readable account/role inventory for the Summit network. PUBLIC-SAFE: on-chain addresses + role descriptions only — NO seeds, mnemonics, or secret locations (those live in the gitignored summit-deployer-skills/guides/SECRETS_AND_CAVEATS.md). The README 'Key accounts' table is generated from this file. This is the seed spec for the future deployment automation/monitoring repo.

accounts.label: DotNS deployer
controls: CREATE3 owner of the entire DotNS contract suite
owner-override registration of every reserved/PoP-gated .dot name (registerReserved)
constructor owner of all Mercado contracts
accounts.notes: Raw secp256k1 EVM key — no SS58 representation. Distinct from the DotNS UI owner (0x7e0e...). This is the key behind every .dot name registration.

accounts.label: DotNS whitelister
accounts.notes: Operational role separate from the DotNS owner: can whitelist addresses without being the contract owner. Verified live by check-readiness.mjs PART A.

accounts.label: CDM admin
accounts.notes: CAVEAT: this is the CDM *registry* owner, but `cdm deploy` must be signed by a Bulletin-authorized account (w3s-publisher), NOT this one — see SECRETS_AND_CAVEATS.md.

accounts.label: W3S publisher
controls: Bulletin-authorized uploader for nearly all app uploads
signer for `cdm deploy` (publishes ABI to Bulletin)
deployer of Playground / Browse / LocalDOT / Simple Survey / Rock-Paper-Scissors / Feedback contracts
accounts.notes: The most overloaded account — straddles upload, name ownership, and several contract deploys. CI secret MNEMONIC / DOTNS_MNEMONIC in app repos = this account (see SECRETS_AND_CAVEATS.md).

accounts.label: DotNS UI owner
controls: owner of the dotns.dot name (DotNS UI)
used as a generic read/view-call origin in tooling (check-readiness.mjs)
accounts.notes: Distinct from both the DotNS deployer (0x8c78...) and the W3S publisher. The dotns.dot app was uploaded by w3s-publisher but the name is owned here.

accounts.label: Browse trusted attester
controls: trusted attester recognized by Browse TrustedAttesterIndexResolver
accounts.notes: Attestation authority for the Browse privacy-app directory.

accounts.label: Playground read origin
controls: dry-run query origin for the Playground SPA's live CDM registry reads
accounts.notes: Derived as DEV_PHRASE//<app>-querier. MUST be funded + Revive.map_account()'d on Summit or every live read fails (strict white-screen). Public dev phrase self-signs the map. Each consumer SPA has its OWN read origin.

accounts.label: Constellation read origin
controls: dry-run query origin for the Constellation kiosk SPA's live CDM registry reads
accounts.notes: = the committed TEAM_SURI phrase (= playground-app's project deploy signer), a DIFFERENT account from playground's read origin. Funded + mapped 2026-06-14. Mapping one read origin does NOT cover another — map per-SPA.

accounts.label: Identity backend attester (real account)
controls: the on-chain identity recognised by the identity-backend service (ATTESTER_PUBLIC_KEY); registers usernames on the Summit People chain via peopleLite.attest, and (when DOTNS_GATEWAY_ENABLED) reserves .dot names via dotnsGateway.reserve_name on Asset Hub
accounts.notes: Public key 0xce83e4d44cec5d2bd0cdafe71d48dddb691a9ef7216d83828071f7fa112b3137 (= GET /api/v1/attester on the live service). This is the REAL account in PROXY_DELEGATION mode; a separate secret proxy key (PROXY_PRIVATE_KEY / ATTESTER_PROXY_PRIVATE_KEY) signs Proxy.proxy on its behalf. ⚠️ VERIFIED 2026-06-15 on wss://summit-people-rpc.polkadot.io: PeopleLite.AttestationAllowance(5GjU…)=NULL (zero) AND Proxy.Proxies(5GjU…)=NULL — so username registration is NOT yet functional on Summit. Allowance grant is Root/Sudo-only (peopleLite.increase_attestation_allowance) via the paritytech/individuality-community bootstrap scripts 12b/12c. Distinct from browse-trusted-attester (EVM/Browse) — different attester role entirely.
